add-png-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add PNG Image to Specific PDF Page using PdfFileMend
add-png-image-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates binding an existing PDF with PdfFileMend, inserting a PNG image onto page two at given coordinates, and saving the modified document.

replace-image-with-bmp.title: Replace Image on PDF Page with BMP
replace-image-with-bmp.description: Shows how to replace the first image on the first page of a PDF with a higher‑resolution BMP using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

overlay-semi-transparent-gif-on-pdf.title: Overlay Semi-Transparent GIF on PDF Using CompositingParameters
overlay-semi-transparent-gif-on-pdf.description: Shows how to place a semi‑transparent GIF onto a specific page of an existing PDF by using PdfFileMend together with CompositingParameters and BlendMode.Normal.

add-word-wrap-footer-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Word‑by‑Word Wrapped Footer to PDF Pages
add-word-wrap-footer-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to place a formatted footer that automatically wraps word‑by‑word across the page width on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp facade.

add-promotional-text-to-specific-pdf-pag.title: Add Promotional Text to Specific PDF Pages
add-promotional-text-to-specific-pdf-pag.description: Demonstrates how to insert the same promotional message on pages 3, 5, and 7 of a PDF using PdfFileMend.AddText with formatted text and a defined rectangle.

add-multi-line-text-custom-spacing-page-.title: Add Multi‑Line Text with Custom Line Spacing to Page 3
add-multi-line-text-custom-spacing-page-.description: Demonstrates how to insert a multi‑line text block with custom line spacing into the left margin of the third page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-and-text-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add Image and Semi‑Transparent Text Watermark to PDF
add-image-and-text-watermark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to stamp an image as a background and then overlay a semi‑transparent text watermark on each page of a PDF.

add-background-png-image-to-all-pdf-page.title: Add Background PNG Image to All PDF Pages
add-background-png-image-to-all-pdf-page.description: Shows how to insert a PNG background image on every page of a PDF using the PdfFileMend facade.

add-header-image-to-pdf-documents.title: Add Header Image to PDF Documents
add-header-image-to-pdf-documents.description: Shows how to insert a header image on every page of one or more PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-add-logo-to-pdf-pages.title: Batch Add Logo to PDF Pages
batch-add-logo-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of PDF files and add a company logo PNG to the top‑right corner of each page using Aspose.Pdf and its Facades API.

insert-png-signature-on-every-pdf-page.title: Insert PNG Signature on Every PDF Page
insert-png-signature-on-every-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileMend facade to place a PNG signature image at the bottom‑left corner of each page in a PDF document.

add-tiff-image-to-last-page-pdf.title: Add TIFF Image to Last Page of PDF using PdfFileMend
add-tiff-image-to-last-page-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfFileMend, determine the last page, and insert a TIFF image onto that page without altering existing content.

dynamic-image-placement-on-pdf.title: Dynamic Image Placement on PDF Page
dynamic-image-placement-on-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve a PDF page's dimensions, calculate image coordinates proportionally, and add the image to the page using Aspose.Pdf facades.

add-image-to-pdf-with-format-validation.title: Add Image to PDF with Format Validation
add-image-to-pdf-with-format-validation.description: Demonstrates how to validate an image's file format before using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to insert it into a PDF page.

pdffilemend-try-finally-save.title: Modify PDF with PdfFileMend and Ensure Save Using Try‑Finally
pdffilemend-try-finally-save.description: Demonstrates how to bind, modify, and save a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend while guaranteeing that resources are released with a try‑finally block.

add-images-to-pdf-with-error-handling.title: Add Images to PDF with Error Handling
add-images-to-pdf-with-error-handling.description: Shows how to insert multiple images into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend and gracefully handle missing files or exceptions during the AddImage operation.

add-image-and-text-with-audit-logging.title: Add Image and Text to PDF with Audit Logging
add-image-and-text-with-audit-logging.description: Demonstrates using PdfFileMend to insert an image and formatted text into a PDF page while logging each operation with timestamps for audit purposes.

add-word-wrapped-paragraph-to-pdf.title: Add Word‑Wrapped Paragraph to PDF
add-word-wrapped-paragraph-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to enable the ByWords word‑wrap mode with PdfFileMend and TextParagraph, then add a long paragraph that exceeds a defined rectangle so the text wraps by words in the resulting PDF.

add-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add Image to Specific PDF Page
add-image-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to insert an image into a specified page of an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileMend facade.

add-image-to-pdf-return-bytes.title: Add Image to PDF and Return as Byte Array
add-image-to-pdf-return-bytes.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to load a PDF, place an image on the first page, and return the modified PDF as a byte array for writing to an HTTP response.

async-add-image-to-pdf.title: Asynchronous Add Image to PDF with PdfFileMend
async-add-image-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add an image to a specific PDF page asynchronously by wrapping PdfFileMend operations in Task.Run, including argument validation and cancellation support.

extract-images-from-pdf-to-png.title: Extract Images from PDF to PNG
extract-images-from-pdf-to-png.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF file and save each image as an individual PNG file.

extract-images-from-pdf-pages.title: Extract Images from Specific PDF Pages
extract-images-from-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to extract all images from pages 2‑5 of a PDF and save them to a temporary directory using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs with Page and Index Naming
batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to process all PDF files in a folder, extract images from each page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and save them with filenames that contain the original PDF name, page number, and image index.

remove-image-from-pdf-page.title: Remove Image from PDF Page Using PdfContentEditor
remove-image-from-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific image, identified by its object ID, from a given page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

remove-all-images-from-pdf.title: Remove All Images from PDF
remove-all-images-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to delete every image from an existing PDF and save the modified document to a new file.

replace-low-res-images-with-high-res-png.title: Replace Low-Resolution Images with High-Resolution PNGs
replace-low-res-images-with-high-res-png.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF pages and replace each low‑resolution image with a corresponding high‑resolution PNG using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

verify-text-position-in-pdf.title: Verify Text Position in PDF
verify-text-position-in-pdf.description: Creates a PDF, adds a text fragment at specific X/Y coordinates, saves and reloads the document, then extracts the fragment to assert that the coordinates match the expected values.

verify-pdf-size-after-adding-image.title: Verify PDF Size Increase After Adding Image
verify-pdf-size-after-adding-image.description: Creates a blank PDF, adds an image using PdfFileMend, and includes unit tests that confirm the PDF byte size grows and the file remains a valid PDF.
